name: Claymore Mine
prompt:
M18A1 Claymore anti-personnel mine. Iconic directional mine with "FRONT TOWARD ENEMY" embossed text.

Physical structure:
- Body: curved rectangular box, ~0.22m wide, ~0.08m tall, ~0.03m deep
  - Slightly convex front face (the killing side)
  - Flat back
  - Olive drab green
  - "FRONT TOWARD ENEMY" - represented as a lighter colored strip across the front upper area
- Legs: two folding scissor-type legs (wire legs) at bottom
  - Spike into ground
  - Each leg: thin angled rod, ~0.1m long
  - Splayed outward for stability
- Detonator well: small cylindrical port on top
- Wire: thin detonating wire trailing from top, running back ~0.5m along ground
  - Very thin cylinder

Colors: OD green body (0x556B2F), lighter text area (0x7B7B5F), wire (0x444444), metal legs (0x666666)
Orientation: Front face toward +Z, sitting on legs at Y=0
Scale: Real-world meters (~0.22m wide, ~0.08m tall)
